name: Cloud Migration Services
description: Strukturiertes Cloud-Migrationsprogramm mit Assessment-Framework, modularer CMF-Methodik (Assess-Mobilize-Modernize), 6R-Migrationsstrategien (Rehost bis Retire), Datenbank-Migrations-Services, Cloud-Migration-Factory-Teams und sprint-basierte Implementierung für sichere, standardisierte Migrations-Durchführung.

issues.detail: Portfolio language is 'en' but description is written in German.
Description is an overly long single sentence packing in 7+ concepts. Should be broken into a concise summary with supporting detail fields.
Lists methodology components (6R, CMF, sprints) but does not state the value — e.g., predictable migration timelines, reduced downtime risk.
Missing fields: product, created, status, differentiators, use_cases.
CMF and 6R are domain-specific terms that may not be universally understood.
